creator: enlil65@gmail.com
text:
Version 4.5.6 is available and has a fix for feature/bug introduced in 4.5.4; that version crashes when used with Python 3.

On my system using 4.5.4:
[Fri Sep 02 17:24:41 2016] [notice] Apache/2.2.31 (FreeBSD) mod_wsgi/4.5.4 Python/3.4.5 PHP/5.5.38 mod_ssl/2.2.31 OpenSSL/1.0.1p-freebsd configured -- resuming normal operations
[Fri Sep 02 17:24:45 2016] [notice] child pid 69835 exit signal Segmentation fault (11)

Version 4.5.4 is unusable at my site for this reason.
Thanks!
